active.title: Production-Grade Shardability: Budgets, Invariants & Runbook
active.summary: Make sharding production-grade with lag/backlog budgets per shard, fairness/distribution checks, hot-shard skew alerting, and operational runbook for shard incidents.

active.title: Codebase Evolution and Modernization Program
active.summary: Plano mestre para remover legado, consolidar design patterns, fechar lacunas de implementacao planejada e definir a evolucao do Market Raccoon com gates de qualidade.
